title: dehaasia rangamattiensis
intro: Dehaasia rangamattiensis, also known as Dehaasia, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae, native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dehaasia rangamattiensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or powder, and is also used in the form of herbal tea or oil for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
